criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on platforms like Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration and features such as natural language processing, predictive analytics, and automation.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms such as iOS, Android, Web, and Desktop.

criteria.name: Integration with Other Tools
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other productivity tools and services.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, user reviews

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, user reviews

criteria.name: Security and Privacy
criteria.description: Measures taken to ensure user data security and privacy.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, security audits

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.

criteria.name: Pricing
criteria.description: Cost of the app and any additional in-app purchases or subscriptions.
